prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body portrait of a young man, Lin Shiyun, standing centered on a pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words. Cinematic atmosphere, photorealistic, aesthetic and delicate style.

He is a young man with an ordinary appearance, average build, and gentle demeanor. His hair is chestnut brown, medium in length, slightly tousled but clean. He has kind, warm eyes that reflect sincerity and a hint of contemplation. His facial features are unassuming yet pleasant, with a clear, gentle smile. His skin tone is a natural, warm hue. His posture is elegant and calm.

He wears simple, modern yet timeless clothing in muted, earthy tones—a soft linen shirt and comfortable trousers—over which is tied a clean, white apron. Around his neck, on a simple cord, hangs a faintly glowing jade pendant. His hands are slender and expressive, suggesting careful work.

The overall impression is one of understated charm, quiet determination, and a deep, innate connection to the art of cooking, fitting the warm, memory-filled world of "The Fried Rice Legend of Fragrant Lane"., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: 电影氛围，真实感突出，唯美画风
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
